query: Summarize this Page Index paper into the standard Markdown report format.
why: Direct Page Index paper summary request.

query: Find these citations in Page Index, read them fully, and save one summary file per paper under memory/pageindex/summary/.
why: Full Page Index-specific wrapper workflow: resolution, read verification, then per-paper summaries.

query: Use the verified Page Index filenames I already have and turn each one into a saved summary report.
why: Page Index source is explicit even though resolution may already be done.

query: Summarize this local PDF into structured reading notes.
why: General paper summarization outside Page Index should trigger summarize-research-papers instead.

query: Find this paper in Page Index and tell me whether it exists.
why: Paper-finding only should trigger pageindex-find-papers, not the summary wrapper.

query: Read this verified Page Index file fully and report whether every page was covered.
why: Coverage-only reading verification should trigger pageindex-read-papers.

query: Compare these five papers from Page Index in one synthesis memo.
why: Cross-paper synthesis is out of scope even if the papers come from Page Index.

query: Classify this Page Index paper into my taxonomy.
why: Classification is not the purpose of this skill.
